name: video-bug-analyzer
description: Diagnose UI and rendering bugs from a screen recording. Give Claude a video and roughly when the bug happens; the plugin extracts frames — an overview contact sheet, scene-cut detection, or per-timestamp zoom with before/after strips — then reasons over them to pinpoint the defect. Strong on persistent visual bugs, honest about flicker, timing, and off-screen state. Requires ffmpeg (auto-installs where the sandbox allows).
